title: Example Scene
description: A copyable scene format for early Archive of Sparks contributors.

setting.location: A city street during a platform delivery shift

opening: Everyone is busy. But few people know why they are busy.

beats.summary: The platform sends a new order.
The route is calculated by an algorithm.
The worker feels that every minute is being measured.

centralQuestion: Why are contemporary workers managed by algorithms and platforms?

choices.label: Political Economy Route
choices.consequence: Connect the scene to labor, capital, control, risk, and production relations.

choices.label: Technology Route
choices.consequence: Connect the scene to routing, ranking, dispatch, timers, and platform algorithms.

atangPromptNotes: Atang should help the player connect the scene to knowledge routes.
Atang should be clear, lively, and concise.
Atang should not give unsafe real-world confrontation instructions.
todos: Connect this scene to a reusable chapter framework.
